ocr_findings.description: Section heading marker rendered as '○●' in OCR for 差分バックアップ and 増分バックアップ headings — image shows a coloured double-dot icon (•• style). Functionally equivalent, cosmetic.
Page number '416' appears at end of OCR output as trailing line — cosmetic.

Full backup diagram labels (A→B→C→障害→C', フルバックアップ labels, '最新のフルバックアップで直前の状態に戻す' callout) are in image but only a caption placeholder is in OCR. Low severity as body text explains the diagram verbally.

reviewer_notes: Page covers フルバックアップ conclusion paragraph, 差分バックアップ full definition and explanation, and 増分バックアップ opening definition. All body text faithfully captured. Two diagram image placeholders (full backup flow, differential backup cylinder diagram) are acceptable. OCR text cuts off at 'からの追加' matching the page boundary.
